rows.label: MesLock_001
rows.name:
First, let's head to the Habitat—the White
Whale's residential unit. The planet's not
going anywhere, so exploring can wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_002
rows.name:
We need to plant that data probe.
Let's set a course for east NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_003
rows.name:
Let's head to the administrative
district. I'll show you where
you'll be staying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_004
rows.name:
We need to show you the administrative
district. We'll get to the other
areas in due time, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_005
rows.name:
I know you're raring to go, but
we should take a breather at
the Home and report to Nagi.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_006
rows.name:
Our top priority is accomplishing
the mission. We've got a destination,
so let's double-time it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_007
rows.name:
Time to rest is a luxury we don't have—
the mission is all that matters now.
We must protect NLA at all costs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_008
rows.name:
It wouldn't be wise to stray from
this area. Vandham's counting on
us to finish the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_009
rows.name:
Let's hop a ride on that transport
to get to the AD. Just talk to
the pilot to get going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_010
rows.name:
Our top priority is the mission.
Continue defending the east gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_011
rows.name:
Let's make a beeline for the
administrative district. No side trips![ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_012
rows.name:
This gate is still sealed. Let's
circle around to the other entrance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_013
rows.name:
Let's set a course for the
Home. We can sightsee later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_101
rows.name:
Let's make for the bridge. This
can't really afford to wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: MesLock_102
rows.name:
This is no time to be hanging
around. We have to settle this...[ST:wait ]
